name: io.github.codespar/mcp-adyen
description: MCP server for Adyen Checkout API v71 — global enterprise payments used by iFood, Uber, Spotify in LatAm

environmentVariables.name: ADYEN_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Adyen API key (generated in Customer Area → Developers → API credentials)

environmentVariables.name: ADYEN_MERCHANT_ACCOUNT
environmentVariables.description: Adyen merchant account code (appears in most request bodies)

environmentVariables.name: ADYEN_LIVE_URL_PREFIX
environmentVariables.description: Required when ADYEN_ENV=live. Your merchant-specific prefix, e.g. 1797a841fbb37ca7-AdyenDemo
